Player Registration

2026 Registration

Join Team Freedom for the 2026 Summer Season. Complete the registration form and submit your fee to secure your spot on the roster.

Tournament Entry Fees $203.00
Uniform $125.00
Field Rental & Insurance $42.00
Total Season Fee $375.00

Freedom Baseball is a not for profit organization and all coaches are unpaid volunteers. Any additional funds raised throughout the season will be used towards equipment, end of season celebration or other fees incurred by the team.

Payment Options

We keep it simple. Pay with zero or near-zero fees:

💸 Zelle FREE
💙 Venmo FREE
💳 Card +$11.18

⭐ Zelle is recommended — completely free, direct bank-to-bank transfer. Funds available immediately in our team account.

No Hidden Fees
Payment Options

Zelle and Venmo are completely free. A $11.18 CC processing fee applies to card payments, bringing the card total to $386.18.

⭐ Recommended
💸
Zelle
0% Fee — Free

Direct bank-to-bank transfer. Instant and free. Open your bank app, search Zelle, and send to:

📧 obriente@gmail.com

or phone: 732-674-2809

💙
Venmo
0% Fee (Personal)

Send as "Friends & Family" to avoid fees. Search for the team handle on Venmo:

@Danielle-Obrien-13

⚠️ Do NOT select "Goods & Services" (adds fees)

💳
Card / Online
+$11.18 Processing Fee

Pay securely by credit or debit card. A $11.18 CC processing fee is included at checkout. Total charged: $386.18.
